name: Sonny
epitaph: A Girl's Best Friend & Dream Come True. Gone suddenly, but not forgotten.

name: Kaylee
epitaph: What a great gallop we had!

name: Jameson
epitaph: He cost everything. Wouldn't trade it for the world🖤

name: Quick Stone
epitaph: The most expensive free horse there ever was, who despised Miller Lite and the color purple

name: Maverick
epitaph: Born to race, but he never did. He ran like the wind and died too soon, gone but not forgotten.

name: Little Bit
epitaph: The gentle old giant who taught me to ride. A very picky eater.
